prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-LGMUSICKEYBOARD-HK6012A-PNK Product Type: MUSICAL_INSTRUMENT_TOY Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Jumbo Electronic Music Keyboard Piano with Lights Microphone Sounds Cell Phone Holder, Girls, Pink, Ages 3+ Description: The Kidplokio Jumbo Music Electronic Keyboard Piano is ideal for your tiny future Beethoven to start mastering their musical skills. Featuring lights, music, sounds, a microphone, a DJ function and cell phone holder, this jumbo kids keyboard piano toy from Kidplokio with stand and stool is a seriously awesome musical kids toy for little music lovers, that will have them singing, dancing and engaging with music.

Kidplokio's playtime keyboard piano and microphone set is the perfect music toy to let your kid's inner rock star shine. They can sing along to prerecorded music or carry their own tune while playing the piano keyboard. And, to make things even more fun, the flashing lights help your little one imagine or pretend play that they are performing on stage to a live audience (and the stuffies go wild.)

This jumbo keyboard piano features 39 different animal, rhythm, stereo and instrumental sounds, as well as different genres of music; not only will these fun sounds encourage little ones to express their inner rock star when jamming out, it will also help them to learn and recognize all these different noises; perfect for young creative and musical minds, the keyboard piano improves the development of hand eye coordination and enhances musical awareness, making it a great educational learning toy and tool.

The Kidplokio kids keyboard piano only requires batteries to get going, no assembly or fussing required. The electronic battery operated piano toy from Kidplokio is suitable for toddlers and young children, both girls and boys alike. The Kidplokio Kids Keyboard Piano is ideal for your tiny future singer-songwriter to start creating and expressing their love for music, singing and dancing.

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: piano keyboard for kids music education learning toys girls toddlers dancing singing DJ lights electric piano christmas gift hanukkah gifts cool gifts under 100 dollars holiday toy list 2021 musical instrument Features: - GIRLS JUMBO KEYBOARD PIANO TOY: Featuring lights, music, sounds, a microphone, a DJ function and cell phone holder, this jumbo keyboard piano toy from Kidplokio with stand and stool is a seriously awesome musical kids toy for little music lovers, that will have them singing, dancing and engaging with music! - OVER 30 SOUNDS AND FUN MUSIC: This jumbo keyboard piano for kids features 39 different animal, rhythm, stereo and instrumental sounds, as well as different genres of music; not only will these fun sounds encourage little ones to express their inner rockstar when jamming out, it will also help them to learn and recognize all these different noises - EDUCATIONAL LEARNING TOYS: This keyboard piano and microphone is a perfect creative outlet for young minds; Combined with an improved development of hand eye coordination and enhanced musical awareness, the piano keyboard will not only provide hours of fun, but is an educational learning tool too - HANDY CELL PHONE HOLDER: The electronic keyboard piano has a convenient cell phone holder compartment that little ones can perch a phone to read music, watch a piano lesson, play their favorite songs or video record their concert! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 18 x 7 x 17.7 inches; Colors: Blue or Pink; Power: x3 1.5V "AA" batteries not included; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
